summary: Comprehensive pre-launch testing of Kilolab marketplace. Tested all major user flows: landing page, navigation, signup, new order (5 steps), become washer, legal pages, mobile responsiveness. Most features working correctly. Found issues with Supabase API key causing 401 errors on /trouver page and Legal mentions page incomplete.

critical.issue: 401 errors on /trouver page - 'Invalid API key' shown in console. Washers list cannot be loaded.
critical.console_error: Erreur chargement washers: {message: Invalid API key, hint: Double check your Supabase `anon` or `service_role` API key.}

minor.issue: Vercel serverless function returns 404 in preview - expected, only works on Vercel production

integration_issues.issue: Supabase API returns 401 - cannot load washers list

issues: Page shows 'Page en cours de finalisation' banner
Siège social shows 'En cours de définition'
Directeur de la publication shows 'En cours'

passed_tests: Landing page - Hero section, CTAs, trust badges all present and functional
Landing page - All nav links work (Tarifs, Trouver, FAQ, Contact)
Landing page - Login, Order, and Washer CTA buttons in navbar work
Landing page - Footer links to CGU, CGV, Privacy, Cookies all work
Tarifs page - Standard (3€/kg) and Premium (5€/kg) pricing cards display correctly
Tarifs page - CTA buttons 'Choisir Standard' and 'Choisir Express' present
Tarifs page - FAQ accordion section works
FAQ page - 11 accordion items load and expand/collapse correctly
Contact page - Form has email, subject, message fields and submit button
Signup page - Role selection (Client/Pressing) works
Signup page - Form has name, email, password fields
Signup page - CGU/RGPD checkbox present with links to CGU, CGV, Privacy
New Order - 5-step wizard works: Formula → Weight → Location → Date → Payment
New Order - Auth banner shows for non-authenticated users with Login/Signup CTAs
New Order - AI weight estimation button present
New Order - Promo code input present in payment step
Become Washer (/washers, /become-washer) - Hero with stats (0€ inscription, 24h activation, 7j/7 virements)
Become Washer - Revenue simulator with slider (2.80€/kg commission shown)
Become Washer - Multi-step registration form with all required fields
Login page - Email, password fields, 'Mot de passe oublié?' link present
Admin page (/admin) - Super Access login form displayed
CGU page - Conditions Générales d'Utilisation with 6 sections
CGV page - Conditions Générales de Vente complete
Privacy page - Politique de Confidentialité complete
Cookies page - Cookie policy with essential/analytics cookies info (RGPD compliant)
Legal Mentions - Basic structure present with Vercel/Supabase hosting info
Mobile responsive - Landing page adapts correctly (tested at 390x844)
Mobile responsive - Hamburger menu works with all navigation links
Mobile responsive - New Order form works on mobile with step navigation
Language selector - FR/EN buttons present in mobile menu
Dark mode toggle - Present in navbar
Rating system - WasherReviews and ReviewForm components exist and functional
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Supabase API key issue causing 401 on /trouver page - check VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY env variable
Complete Legal Mentions page with actual company information (SIRET, address, director)
Verify admin credentials (akim.hachili@gmail.com) work in Supabase auth
Consider adding signup link to Login page for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: Supabase API key may be missing or invalid in preview environment - causing 401 on authenticated endpoints
Legal Mentions page needs real company data for RGPD compliance before commercial launch
Instagram promo popup appears on landing - may interfere with user experience
data-testid attributes well implemented on interactive elements (navbar, hero CTAs)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All pages load, forms work, responsive design good

context_for_next_testing_agent: Main issue is Supabase API key returning 401 on /trouver page. All other user flows work well. Legal Mentions page needs completion. Rating system exists (WasherReviews.tsx, ReviewForm.tsx). Mobile responsiveness is good. Instagram popup may appear on landing page.

pages_tested.landing: PASS - All CTAs and navigation work
pages_tested.signup: PASS - Role selection and form work
pages_tested.new_order: PASS - 5-step wizard works with auth banner
pages_tested.become_washer: PASS - Registration form and revenue simulator work
pages_tested.trouver: PARTIAL - Page loads but washers list fails (401 API error)
pages_tested.admin: PASS - Super Access login form displayed
pages_tested.legal: PARTIAL - Structure exists but data incomplete
